indicators.name: kitchen island with seating
indicators.rationale: The kitchen island provides a central workspace for food preparation and dining.

indicators.name: separate dining area
indicators.rationale: A dedicated dining area allows for separate meal preparation and eating spaces.

indicators.name: glass railings
indicators.rationale: Glass railings may pose a safety hazard when cooking with open flames.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: An open layout allows for better communication and supervision while cooking with children or pets.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for daily cooking due to the presence of a kitchen island and a separate dining area. However, the glass railings could pose a safety risk, and the open layout might not be ideal for all cooking tasks.
